name: Tyrique (Ty) Daniel
headline: Front End Developer | Next.js | TypeScript | A11y | SEO | Micro-Frontends
summary: Front-End engineer with 8+ years building high-performance, accessible, SEO-friendly web apps using Next.js/React/TypeScript. Experienced with Storybook design systems, micro-frontend architecture, and CI/CD quality gates.

experience.title: CTO / Frontend Architect
bullets: Built Next.js SSR surfaces optimized for SEO and page speed; improved Core Web Vitals via rendering + asset optimizations.
Created reusable component patterns and Storybook-driven UI library to increase consistency and reduce rework.
Delivered modular features with independent deployment boundaries (micro-frontend style) to enable parallel team velocity.
